stories.headline: Vercel Breach Forces Crypto Devs Into Emergency API Key Rotation
stories.tldr: Web infra giant Vercel disclosed a security incident that may have exposed customer API keys, triggering a scramble across crypto teams to rotate credentials.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Vercel underpins a huge share of crypto frontends and analytics dashboards, so a key leak is a supply-chain risk the entire dApp stack has to assume and re-verify.
the_details: Vercel confirmed the breach on April 20, warning customers that API keys may have been exposed and pushing them to rotate.
Crypto projects began rotating tokens for RPC providers, analytics, and deploy pipelines within hours of disclosure.
Lands mid-spree: $450M lost across 45 protocols in two weeks, led by Kelp DAO ($292M) and Drift ($285M).

stories.headline: BTC Pinned at $75,324 as US-Iran Ceasefire Clock Runs Out Midweek
stories.tldr: Bitcoin hovers just above ETF cost basis while traders brace for the US-Iran ceasefire to lapse by mid-week, the next macro catalyst for risk assets.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: CoinShares flags the ~$74K ETF cost basis as the structural line in the sand; losing it turns a macro wobble into a positioning unwind.
the_details: BTC trades at $75,324.58 at 9am ET Monday, down $475 from Sunday's print.
ETH opened at $2,263.49 (-3.7%) before bouncing to $2,307 by 7:35am ET.
CoinShares ETH analyst Luke Nolan pegs follow-through on BTC holding the ETF cost basis through the ceasefire expiry.

stories.headline: Bitmine Buys 101,627 ETH Worth $230M, Closes in on 5M ETH Treasury
stories.tldr: Ethereum treasury firm Bitmine scooped 101,627 ETH in its largest weekly haul of 2026, pushing holdings toward the 5 million ETH threshold.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A corporate treasury buying ETH at scale during a DeFi stress event signals institutional comfort with ETH as a balance-sheet asset, not just a trade.
the_details: Purchase value reported at over $230 million across the week.
Represents Bitmine's largest weekly ETH accumulation of 2026 to date.
Firm now sits near 5 million ETH, one of the largest non-exchange ETH holders globally.

stories.headline: Perp Longs Get Gutted: $306M in Crypto Liquidations, 81% From Bulls
stories.tldr: Crypto perps saw $306.82M in 24-hour liquidations, with long-biased traders absorbing 81% of the damage amid DeFi contagion and Iran-headline risk.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Liquidation skew this extreme typically flushes leverage and resets funding — a constructive precondition once macro overhang clears.
the_details: Total 24h liquidations: $306.82M across major perpetual venues.
81% of wipeouts came from long positions, per Blockchain Magazine data.
Fear & Greed Index dropped to 27 (Fear) as BTC tested $74K support.

stories.headline: Harvard Lifts BTC ETF Stake 257% as CalPERS Plows $500M Into Bitcoin
stories.tldr: Harvard's endowment boosted Bitcoin ETF exposure 257% while CalPERS allocated $500M, a stark contrast to retail fear pinned at 27 on the F&G index.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Long-duration pools stepping in during volatility is the 'smart money' footprint that historically precedes bottoming processes, even if timing is messy.
the_details: Harvard Management Co. raised BTC ETF holdings by 257% in latest 13F filing.
CalPERS deployed $500 million into BTC products during Q1 2026.
Goldman Sachs disclosed $108 million in Solana ETF exposure in the same filing window.
